g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a user interact with the web app?')
sendPrompt('What does the HTML frontend do?')
g.text: Drag-drop · overlay tabs · pixel stats chart

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Flask backend do?')
g.text: Receives image · runs inference · returns JSON

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does DINOv2 process an image?')
sendPrompt('How does the segmentation head produce a mask?')
sendPrompt('What post-processing steps happen after the model runs?')
g.text: Post-process · colorize mask · blend overlay · pixel stats

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the overlay output look like?')
sendPrompt('What does the segmentation mask look like?')
sendPrompt('What pixel statistics are returned to the frontend?')
